E

EMAIL - Static variable in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.UserProfileDetailsActivity
 
EntrantAdapter - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
This is a class that converts a list of Entrants into a displayable format
EntrantAdapter(Context, List<UserProfile>) - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EntrantAdapter
This initializes the adapter with all Entrants in a list
EntrantInfo - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
This is a class that Contains Entrant Name and ID stored in an event
EntrantsActivity - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
This is a class that is the controller of the activity_entrants screen it allows organiser to navigate to view lists of entrants it also can notify entrants and manages acceptance of entrants
EntrantsActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EntrantsActivity
 
EntrantsActivityTest - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
Tests the functionality of the EntrantActivity it allows organiser to navigate to view lists of entrants it also can notify entrants and manages acceptance of entrants

EventEditedTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.CreateEventActivityTest
test to see if the edits made to the event actually change the the Event object and is saved to the database
EventEditOpenedTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.CreateEventActivityTest
test to see that the event information is populated when an activity is opened with an event to be edited
EventItem - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
Event class that is a container for all information related to an event

creates the Event Object

This creates the Event Object

This creates the Event Object
EventListAdapter - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
This is a class that converts a list of Events into a displayable format
EventListAdapter(Context, List<EventItem>) - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventListAdapter
This initializes the adapter with all Events in a list
EventRepository - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
The Class the manages the interactions between Event as a object in the program and as a document in the database
EventRepository() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepository
creates the EventRepository object which is just references to the database the methods allows for access to Event documents in the database through Ids and event objects

Local unit tests for the logic used during the lottery draw.
